en.text: as if dative case of κύκλος (a ring, "cycle"; akin to G2947); i.e. in a circle (by implication, of G1722), i.e. (adverbially) all around

senses.gloss_en: as if dative case of κύκλος (a ring, "cycle"; akin to G2947); i.e. in a circle (by implication, of G1722), i.e. (adverbially) all around
